name: dac-skills
description: Depth pack for the ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference: Research-Manuscript vs Engineering-Track routing, two-stage Softconf submission, the 6+1 ACM double-column budget, double-blind review, QoR/PPA evidence on EDA benchmarks, ML-for-EDA and hardware-security lanes, and ACM Digital Library camera-ready work.

plugins.name: dac-skills
plugins.description: Twelve DAC-specific skills for the ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (the Chips to Systems Conference) and its double-blind Research Manuscript track, grounded in the DAC 2026 (63rd) call, dac.com, IEEE CEDA, ACM SIGDA, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
